segments.text: Did you know about the full-time offer? I was made aware. Yes. How can you let that happen? What do you mean?
They gave me no raise just more hours more responsibility and a new title
I do not intervene on individual compensation decisions, especially regarding yourself
I want you to have a fair shot just like anyone else
I get that but I provided you a job a mentor and a very comfortable and privileged life
Which is much more than most kids your age could ask for. I know I know and I'm grateful. I just I want son
I don't think I want to stay
like my friends building a startup and I just feel way more drawn to that than
Whatever this is and what resonates with you about that path specifically it feels
Real like I can actually make an impact and be myself
At LARP. It's just meetings about meetings and everyone talking in circles
I understand it could feel that way but our collaborative discourse has always been a foremost pillar of our success
Yeah
Let me ask you this. Do you feel aligned with the work you are doing here?
Not really to be honest and like no offense
But I'm just not personally invested in this product at all
And meanwhile I'm running laps around people working on it all day
Just so I can punch the clock and do it all over again, but that matters
But at the same time like a LARP is safe, you know
Like I know what my life's gonna look like if I stay well
I believe that you have the talent to excel at anything
But I want you to remember when I joined LARP almost 30 years ago. We were a startup really
I was employee number six. I was about your age
We had no playbook no infrastructure. No real clarity or direction Wow
We worked intense 12-hour days under constant stress. We dealt with stakeholders departing partners turning on each other
We almost lost everything multiple times
That sounds like a lot. It is not for the weak Braxton
So you need to ask yourself are you prepared to operate in that kind of environment?
I don't know if I am but I don't you take one more day. Think it through and let the team know tomorrow
Okay, I will very good
